Pricing Docs

Product analytics your whole team can use

Acme Analytics gives product teams a complete picture of how users move through their application. Track activation, retention, and conversion without writing a single line of SQL. Our real-time event pipeline processes millions of events per minute and surfaces the trends that matter, so product managers, designers, and engineers can make decisions from the same source of truth instead of arguing about whose spreadsheet is right.

Dashboards that answer questions

Every dashboard in Acme starts from a question. How many users activated this week? Which onboarding step loses the most signups? What did power users do in their first session that everyone else skipped? Build funnels, cohorts, and retention curves in minutes, share them with a link, and let stakeholders drill into the underlying events themselves rather than filing another data request with the analytics team and waiting three days for an answer.

Privacy-first by design

Acme is built for a world with real privacy rules. Data stays in the region you choose, personally identifiable fields are hashed at ingestion, and data retention windows are enforced automatically. SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR ready, and fully auditable, so your security team signs off quickly and your customers keep their trust in you. Connect your warehouse, invite your team, and get your first insight before lunch. Most teams see their first aha moment within a day of installing the lightweight SDK, which adds less than three kilobytes to your bundle.

Start free trial GitHub SDK
